prose: The Fukui reactivity on aniline was analyzed using DFT at the B3LYP functional with def2-TZVP basis set (tier 'standard') in the gas phase. The most electrophilic site (fukui plus) is atom 3 (carbon), with a value of 2.29759. The most nucleophilic site (fukui minus) is atom 1 (nitrogen), with a value of 0.20452. The dual descriptor value is 2.23102. No warnings were deemed critical, and the analysis is considered trustworthy.
